description_long: This is a stylized, angular combat tactical vehicle with a prominent cylindrical turret mounted on a rectangular tracked chassis. The turret features a large, slanted yellow hatch and a long, black-and-yellow cannon extending from one side. The vehicle's body is adorned with geometric patterns in yellow, orange, gray, and black, giving it a distinctive, blocky appearance. The tracks are wide and robust, with visible tread details and orange highlights along the edges. The rear of the vehicle displays two circular exhaust ports and additional geometric detailing. The overall design suggests a heavily armored, urban-ready combat vehicle with a focus on visual intimidation and functionality.
description: A blocky, stylized combat vehicle with a cylindrical turret, long cannon, and wide tracks, featuring yellow, orange, and gray geometric patterns.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long cannon, slanted yellow hatch, and detailed track with orange highlights.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the wide tracks, cylindrical turret, and pointed yellow hatch.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the cannon visible, turret details, and geometric patterns on the chassis.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying two circular exhaust ports, rear armor, and the back of the tracks.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the right side of the turret; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with visible thick, angular armor panels on the turret and chassis; sloped surfaces and reinforced edges.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Geometric camouflage pattern with yellow, orange, gray, and white angular shapes.
attribute_military_markings: Black hash-like symbol on the turret hatch; no other visible markings.
